docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,291.14 FILED BY OPORTUN, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT CARLISLE, MARIA ADILIA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-15-2018 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
